/usr/local/pspdev/bin/psp-gcc -I/usr/local/pspdev/psp/include -I/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/include -DPSP -L/usr/local/pspdev/lib -L/usr/local/pspdev/psp/lib -L/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib -Wl,-zmax-page-size=128 -specs=/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxspecs -Wl,-q,-T/usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/linkfile.prx /usr/local/pspdev/psp/sdk/lib/prxexports.o CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/engine/graphics.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/engine/physics.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/engine/controls.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/characters.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/vehicles.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/luxury_cars.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/classic_cars.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/world.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/missions.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/weapons.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/police.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/economy.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/phone.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/npcs.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/vegetation.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/audio.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/heist_equipment.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/gta5_features.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/carwash.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/cheats.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/parachute.c.obj CMakeFiles/ELYRIA_STORIES.dir/src/game/savegame.c.obj -o ELYRIA_STORIES  -lpspdisplay -lpspgu -lpspgum -lpspge -lpspkernel -lpspaudio -lpspctrl -lpsputility -lpspuser -lm
